description: 上海普惠口腔品牌官网 - Next.js + Sanity CMS 多分店口腔诊所网站

userStories.title: Initialize Next.js frontend and design system
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to set up the Next.js project with proper tooling and design tokens.
acceptanceCriteria: Create Next.js 14 project in website/ with TypeScript + Tailwind CSS + App Router
Configure ESLint + Prettier
Configure next.config.js for static export
Install and configure shadcn/ui with base components (Button, Card, Sheet, Dialog)
Define design tokens in globals.css: medical blue + warm beige color palette, typography, spacing
Typecheck passes
Build succeeds

userStories.title: Initialize Sanity CMS and content schemas
userStories.description: As a content manager, I need a CMS backend to manage website content.
acceptanceCriteria: Initialize Sanity v3 studio in studio/ directory
Create free Sanity project and configure production dataset
Define content schemas: article, doctor, clinic, booking, banner
Sanity Studio starts successfully and shows all content types
Add at least 1 sample clinic record for testing
userStories.notes: Studio scaffolded and schemas defined. Build and dev server verified. Sample clinic data prepared at studio/sample-data/clinic-sample.ndjson. To connect to a live backend, create a Sanity project and set SANITY_STUDIO_PROJECT_ID in studio/.env.

userStories.title: Connect Next.js to Sanity and build global layout
userStories.description: As a user, I need to see a professional website layout and navigation.
acceptanceCriteria: Install @sanity/client and configure data fetching in lib/sanity.ts
Create RootLayout with semantic HTML structure
Create responsive Navigation component with mobile menu
Create Footer component with ICP placeholder and contact placeholder
Configure default metadata, robots.txt (allow AI crawlers), sitemap.ts, Open Graph and Twitter Card
Verify sample Sanity data renders correctly on a test page
Typecheck passes
Build succeeds
Verify in browser

userStories.title: Develop homepage
userStories.description: As a visitor, I need to understand the clinic and find what I'm looking for.
acceptanceCriteria: Homepage displays institutional name: 上海普惠口腔
Banner carousel reads from Sanity banner documents
Brief objective introduction without absolute terms
Service category entry points
Doctor team preview (reads from Sanity doctors)
Contact info and business hours placeholders
Booking CTA button
Add LocalBusiness Schema.org structured data
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser
userStories.notes: Homepage implemented with banner carousel, service grid, doctor preview, contact CTA, and LocalBusiness schema. Fallback data renders when Sanity is unconfigured.

userStories.title: Develop service page template and core service pages
userStories.description: As a visitor, I need to learn about dental services.
acceptanceCriteria: Create reusable service page template component
Template sections: What is XXX, Applicable situations, Treatment process, Precautions, FAQ
Develop Implant page (/services/implant) with FAQs: 种植牙能用多久, 种植牙疼吗, 种植牙多少钱
Develop Orthodontics page (/services/orthodontics) with FAQs: 隐形矫正价格, 矫正要多久, 成人还能矫正吗
Use objective descriptions without efficacy claims
Add FAQPage Schema.org markup to both service pages
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser
userStories.notes: Service page template created with all required sections. Implant and Orthodontics pages implemented with FAQPage Schema.org markup. Objective descriptions only, no efficacy claims.

userStories.title: Develop remaining service pages, doctors page, and contact page
userStories.description: As a visitor, I need to see all services, doctor credentials, and clinic locations.
acceptanceCriteria: Develop Restoration page (/services/restoration)
Develop Periodontal page (/services/periodontal)
Develop Pediatric page (/services/pediatric)
Doctors page displays cards with photo, name, education, qualifications, specialties, years of practice from Sanity
No subjective terms like '专家' or '权威' used
Add Physician Schema.org markup
Contact page displays all 4 clinics from Sanity with address, phone, hours placeholders
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser
userStories.notes: Restoration, Periodontal, and Pediatric service pages implemented with FAQPage Schema.org markup. Doctors page displays full credentials with Physician Schema.org markup. Contact page shows all 4 clinics with fallback data. Typecheck and build pass.

userStories.title: Develop knowledge base system
userStories.description: As a visitor, I need to browse and read dental health educational articles.
acceptanceCriteria: Article list page (/knowledge) reads articles from Sanity
Support category filtering (种植牙, 正畸, 口腔护理, 牙周, 儿童口腔)
Each article card shows title, excerpt, publish date, read time
Article detail page (/knowledge/[slug]) renders Portable Text content
Article detail shows 40-80 character quick answer at top for GEO optimization
Related articles recommendation section
Add ItemList Schema on list page and Article Schema on detail page
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser
userStories.notes: Knowledge list and detail pages implemented with Portable Text rendering, category filtering, quick answer GEO optimization, related articles, and Schema.org markup. Typecheck, lint, and build pass.

userStories.title: Create and populate initial article content
userStories.description: As a content manager, I need foundational articles to populate the knowledge base.
acceptanceCriteria: Write and publish 10 educational articles in Sanity covering: implants, orthodontics, oral care, periodontal, pediatric dentistry
Each article is 1500-2500 words
Each article contains 3-5 Q&A style subheadings
Include authoritative references and statistics where applicable
Verify all articles display correctly on list and detail pages in browser
No absolute terms or efficacy claims in article content
userStories.notes: 10 comprehensive educational articles created as fallback data and NDJSON import file. Articles cover all 5 categories with 3-5 Q&A sections each, references to WHO/中华口腔医学会/全国口腔健康流行病学调查. Display verified in static export build with 26 pages. To publish to Sanity, create a project and import studio/sample-data/articles-10.ndjson.

userStories.title: Develop online booking system and guide page
userStories.description: As a visitor, I need to submit an appointment request online.
acceptanceCriteria: Booking form page with fields: name, phone, service, preferred date, symptoms, clinic selection
Frontend form validation
On submission, create Booking document in Sanity via API
Show success confirmation message after submission
Develop guide page (/guide) with appointment process, business hours, transportation info
Create privacy policy page compliant with personal information protection law
Typecheck passes
Verify form submission in browser and Sanity Studio

userStories.title: Develop booking admin view in Sanity Studio
userStories.description: As a clinic staff member, I need to view and manage appointment requests in the CMS.
acceptanceCriteria: Create dedicated Booking list view in Sanity Studio
Display key fields: name, phone, service, clinic, status, submittedAt
Support filtering by status (pending, confirmed, completed, cancelled)
Allow editing status field
Verify admin view works in browser

userStories.title: Implement GEO optimization and performance optimization
userStories.description: As an operator, I need the site to rank well and load fast.
acceptanceCriteria: Create llms.txt with site content overview
Ensure all FAQ pages use FAQPage Schema markup
Ensure all article pages use Article Schema markup
Optimize images with Next.js Image component and lazy loading
Set fetchpriority='high' only for hero images
Core pages pre-rendered for static export
Lighthouse performance score > 90
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser

userStories.title: Final compliance review and delivery preparation
userStories.description: As a project owner, I need to ensure the website is compliant and ready for launch.
acceptanceCriteria: Check site-wide for absolute terms (最佳, 第一, 根治, etc.)
Check for efficacy claims (成功率 99%, etc.)
Check no patient testimonials or before/after comparison images
Ensure institutional name consistency (上海普惠口腔)
Add ICP备案号 placeholder to footer
Ensure all pages have unique title and meta description
Static export build succeeds with zero errors
Verify all pages display correctly in browser
Confirm no console errors on critical pages
